{{Quote|I am Seggor Tels, Quarren, and I despise our planet-brothers with all my heart....May the Sea reclaim them! It was their fault I did what I did! Can't you see that?|Seggor Tels|<ref name="Shame" />}}
'''Seggor Tels''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] leader who, motivated by hatred and jealousy of the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] people, helped the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] conquer the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] (also known as Dac) in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. However, Tels went on to rally the Quarren to fight alongside their [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] rivals to oust the Imperial forces in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I seek to understand why I still weep at night for those who died, why I still hate the dreamers who caused it all, and why I feel shame for my role in what transpired. Perhaps what I truly seek is a dream of my own.|Seggor Tels|<ref name="Shame" />}}
Shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Mon Calamari leaders such as [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] initially welcomed the Empire. Quarren leaders like Seggor Tels, on the other hand, preferred to stay in the oceans. Tels, in particular, derided the Mon Calamari's fixation on the stars, and considered them to be pompous dreamers who were ignorant of what life was like for the Quarren of the ocean depths.<ref name="Shame" />

An Imperial agent, acting as an advance scout for a planned Imperial invasion, approached Tels at this time. Seeing a chance to strike back at the hated Mon Calamari, the Quarren leader agreed to sabotage Dac's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]]. In the ensuing [[Subjugation of Mon Calamari|conquest of Dac]], the Imperial forces overwhelmed the defenseless Mon Calamari. However, Tels' initial joy in seeing the Mon Calamari brought down soon turned bitter, as both the Quarren and the Mon Calamari were [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]]. No record exists of any special consideration given to Tels or any other Quarren collaborators by the Empire.<ref name="Shame" />

Blaming the Mon Calamari for forcing the Quarren to become involved in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] affairs, Tels was nevertheless convinced that the Empire had to be forced off their shared homeworld. Over time, Tels convinced the Quarren to join the Mon Calamari–led resistance movement.<ref name="Shame" /> Seggor Tels and others helped the Mon Cal rebel leader Ackbar in a [[Heurkea operation|mission]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="TFU2n" /> When the long struggle finally ended with the [[Calamarian Revolt|liberation of Dac]] in 1 BBY, many of Tels' newly freed people left their homeworld, in search of a new life away from Mon Calamari, Empires, and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellions]]. Tels remained on Dac, however, to live a meditative life in the oceans.<ref name="Shame" />
